claim_bullets.bullet_text: Object.assign extends objects by assigning properties to them (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.198-200).
Object.assign can copy properties from one object to another, functioning as a shallow copy (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.198-200).

source_record_text: Chapter on Object.assign in JavaScript Allongé, covering its usage for extending objects and copying properties.
